meaning: n.过食,过度,恶心vt.使饮食过度,使沉溺于vi.饮食过度
examples: Rationing had put an end to a surfeit of biscuits long ago.
The voters are pretty sick of such a surfeit of primary sloganeering.
News of its fall induced a surfeit of celebratory gunfire.
If there's one thing New York doesn't suffer from, its a surfeit of quality bakeries.
Any reputational damage from a shortage, or surfeit, of cash lies with the central bank.
